amiibo.wave: Super Mario Wave 6: Super Mario 3D World + Bowser's Fury

functionality.effect: Receive a Super Bell, Fire Flower, Boomerang Flower, Super Leaf, Super Mushroom, Lucky Bell, Super Star, Invincibility Leaf, or Invincibility Bell.
Receive a Super Bell, Fire Flower, Boomerang Flower, Super Leaf, Super Mushroom, Lucky Bell, Super Star, Invincibility Leaf, or Invincibility Bell.
Change to character-themed decoration in Bellabel Park hub (Switch 2 Edition only) | Receive a particular power-up depending on the amiibo
Battle and train up a computer-controlled Figure Player of the character (Read+Write)
Unlock a costume based on the character (short-hair version)
Receive a stamp and equipment for the main quest
Unlock a character-themed Mii racing suit
Give Kirby a Copy ability based on the character's abilities and a health item
Unlock character cards to help you in battle (Read+Write)
